## Summary / ملخص

<!-- What changed and why? (1–3 sentences) -->

## Type / نوع التغيير

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor (no user-visible change)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Chore (tooling, CI, deps)

## Checklist / قائمة تحقق

- [ ] `npm run build` passes (root or `frontend/`)
- [ ] `npm run lint` on touched files (or full project if small PR)
- [ ] Relevant tests: `npm run test` (or N/A with reason below)
- [ ] Data access stays in `frontend/services/` (not ad-hoc in components)
- [ ] If user-visible: added a line under `[Unreleased]` in `CHANGELOG.md`

## Screenshots / لقطات (if UI)

<!-- Optional: before/after or N/A -->

## Notes for reviewers / ملاحظات للمراجع

<!-- Risks, follow-ups, deployment notes -->
